name: Crispy Bean Curd Cubes with Peanut Dipping Sa
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sauce ingredients together in a small bowl and set aside.
2. Heat the 1 1/4 cups peanut oil in a deep-fat fryer or a large wok until it almost smokes.
3. Deep-fry the bean curd cubes in two batches. When each batch of bean curd cubes is lightly browned, remove and drain well on paper towels.
4. Arrange the bean curd cubes on a platter and serve the peanut sauce separately as a dipping sauce.
